new_ptool.description: Checks for evidence linking a person, object, or location to a specific event or another element in the case.
examples: Check if there is any evidence placing Addison or Octavia at the scene with the crowbar or any direct witness accounts
Check if there is any direct evidence linking Chris to the murder, such as the incident report or other clues
Check if Ronald has any connection to the mosque or was seen there on the day of the murder
Check if there is any mention of Mark being near the mosque or having an opportunity to commit the murder
Check if there is any direct evidence linking either suspect to the crime scene or the time of murder
